text:
Created attachment 236105
0001-Mk-Uses-compiler.mk-Support-newer-C-standards

Hello,

I would like to ask for an exp-run to update/improve compiler.mk, thank you!

Patch is attached and can also be found here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~zirias/patches/0001-Mk-Uses-compiler.mk-Support-newer-C-standards.patch

Cheers, Felix
